testimonial: Randall did a great job working in our 1872 Victorian house. We asked him to repurpose an original interior door. He had some great suggestions on the best way to hang the door and utilize new and antique hardware. He notified us in advance what time he would arrive. He was very careful when he was working in our house. He cleaned up thoroughly during the job, not just after completing the day's activities. Randall is a skilled carpenter who is also a nice person.
